resolution_note: Initial verdict NEEDS_REVIEW với 2 HIGH + 2 MED + 2 LOW. Sau khi apply fix: HIGH 1 (adapter protocol bypass) RESOLVED bằng cách raise HTTP 501 nếu adapter thiếu verify_signature (fail-loud thay silent skip); FakeChannel trong 2 test file thêm no-op verify_signature. HIGH 2 (endpoint↔oa_id binding) DOCUMENTED as known gap defer to P4 với inline TODO reference (P4 land shops.zalo_oa_id + endpoint_to_shop enhanced map). MED 3 (PII logging) RESOLVED bằng logger.info → logger.debug cho sender/recipient IDs. MED 4 (repo docstring ambiguity) RESOLVED bằng expanded docstring giải thích operational-vs-DB constraint + P4 defer reference. LOW 5 (future timestamp test) RESOLVED — added test_replay_future_timestamp_raises_401. LOW 6 (int() defensive parsing) WAIVED — ValueError already caught and mapped 400 correctly. Diff hash recomputed after all fixes.

issues_verified.description: Adapter Protocol optional bypass → hard 501 raise. Test FakeChannel opted into no-op verify_signature.

Endpoint↔oa_id confused-deputy gap. Documented inline + spec P4 goal will bind (channel, external_id) → (shop_id, allowed_oa_ids). Materialize only when P4 mounts (enabled=True + multi-shop shared oa_id).
logger.info → logger.debug cho sender/recipient IDs (PDPL data-minimization).
Docstring expanded — operational requirement (unique oa_id per shop per env) + P4 defer note.
Added test_replay_future_timestamp_raises_401 để cover bi-directional window.
int() ValueError caught → 400 correctly. Explicit regex validation nice-to-have but not blocking.

verified_dimensions.correctness: Signature formula matches docs Zalo canonical (sha256+app_id+data+timestamp+OAsecret). Raw body preserved through verify → downstream re-parse. Replay window bi-directional (`abs()`). hmac.compare_digest constant-time.
verified_dimensions.completeness: 8 unit + 4 endpoint + 1 future timestamp = 13 tests cover valid via recipient+sender/wrong sig/missing header/malformed body/replay past+future/tampered body/unknown oa_id/parse-skipped-on-verify-fail. Missing: multi-shop shared oa_id (deferred to P4 with test hook).
verified_dimensions.safety: Verify TRƯỚC parse enforced (test proves parse_count=0 on verify fail). Fail-loud 501 if adapter missing method. PII logs demoted to DEBUG. HIGH 2 confused-deputy documented + P4 defer.
verified_dimensions.ai_invariants: No LLM interaction in P1. Boundary preserved: raw body from Zalo untrusted → verify → payload trusted. `hasattr` pattern replaced with strict raise — no silent bypass.
verified_dimensions.style: Vietnamese comments explain WHY (why raise 501, why DEBUG not INFO, why P4 defer). File exclusion + review references inline for future readers.
